# byte

> Technical tutorials and articles on modern software development — covering programming, AI, web development, mobile development, cloud technologies, and open source.

byte is a tech blog with practical engineering articles, from framework fundamentals to shipping smarter systems. This file expands on llms.txt with full descriptions, categories, tags, publish dates, and read times for every article.

Site: https://byte.surajx.in
Blog index: https://byte.surajx.in/blog
Categories: https://byte.surajx.in/categories
About: https://byte.surajx.in/about
RSS: https://byte.surajx.in/rss.xml
Contact: https://byte.surajx.in/contact

---

## Redis Pub/Sub Explained - Build Real-Time Apps with Redis
URL: https://byte.surajx.in/blog/redis-pubsub-explained
Category: Redis · Tags: Redis, Pub/Sub, DevOps, WebSockets
Published: Jul 15, 2026 · 8 min read
Understand Redis Pub/Sub internals and use it to build real-time features like chat, notifications, and live updates. Covers publish/subscribe basics, PSUBSCRIBE pattern matching, a Node.js chat example with ioredis and WebSockets, why Pub/Sub is needed when scaling horizontally across server instances, common use cases (notifications, presence, dashboards, cache invalidation), its limitations (no persistence, no delivery guarantees, no consumer groups), and when to use Redis Streams instead.

## Google AdSense for Developers: How to Monetize Your Tech Blog
URL: https://byte.surajx.in/blog/google-adsense-for-developers
Category: Career · Tags: AdSense, Blogging, Monetization
Published: Jan 29, 2026 · 7 min read
Prepare a technical blog for advertising while keeping the reading experience and policy compliance first. Walks through prerequisites before applying, account setup, site verification, the review process and common rejection reasons, choosing auto vs manual ad placement, where ads belong on a technical blog, getting paid, and tracking performance metrics like RPM and CTR.

## How to Optimize Website Performance for Better Core Web Vitals
URL: https://byte.surajx.in/blog/optimize-core-web-vitals
Category: Performance · Tags: Performance, Core Web Vitals, SEO
Published: Jan 28, 2026 · 8 min read
Improve loading, responsiveness, and visual stability with a measurement-led performance workflow focused on Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS) and related optimization techniques.
